title: January 14
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}

'''January 14''' is the 14th day of the year. 351 days (352 in leap years) remain in the year after this day.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1921|1921]] – [[John Tartaglione]] is born.
*[[1940s#1948|1948]] – [[Carl Weathers]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Lawrence Kasdan]] is born.
*[[1997]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode IV: A New Hope]]'' re-released.
*[[2010]] – [[Mark Jones]] dies.
*[[2011]] – "[[Monster]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars: Attack Squadrons]]'' enters closed beta.
*[[2015]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 1|''Star Wars'' (2015) 1]] published.
*[[2017]] – "[[Warhead (episode)|Warhead]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[The Legends of Luke Skywalker—The Manga]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Dave Wolverton]] dies.
*2022 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: The Nightsisters|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: The Nightsisters]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2025]] – "[[The Real Good Guys]]" aired on Disney+.
*[[2026]] – [[Legacy of Vader 12|''Legacy of Vader'' 12]] published.
